payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please specify the detail you want remembered before I can suggest an appropriate memory action.
repair_options: Clarify the specific fact, preference, task, or event from yesterday that you want remembered.
Provide context such as the person, project, place, or topic associated with “the thing.”
If this refers to an existing memory, identify which memory it should relate to.
If it is a new fact, restate it explicitly so it can be considered as a separate memory candidate.
